---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a real improvement instead of vague wishcasting
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What user problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the Telegram UX, command flow, or admin flow you want.

## Why The Current Behavior Falls Short

What is missing today?

## Scope Check

Does this fit the current project boundary, or is it clearly future work?

## Extra Context

Examples, mockups, protocol notes, or prior art.
